guidelines: Use semantic <button>. 44x44px touch target. 4.5:1 contrast. Focus ring. Enter/Space activation. aria-label for icon-only buttons.
keyboardSupport: Enter and Space activate the button.
commonMistakes: Using div instead of button. Missing aria-label for icon-only. Insufficient contrast.

guidelines: Associate with visible <label>. aria-describedby for errors. 4.5:1 contrast. Use correct input types. aria-required for required fields.
commonMistakes: Placeholder as label. Missing error association. No visible label.

guidelines: Trap focus while open. Return focus on close. Escape to close. role=dialog, aria-modal=true. aria-labelledby for title.
keyboardSupport: Escape closes. Tab cycles within dialog.
commonMistakes: No focus trap. Missing Escape handler. Not restoring focus.

guidelines: Visible label. Arrow key navigation. Announce selection. aria-expanded. Keyboard-accessible options.
keyboardSupport: Enter/Space opens. Arrows navigate. Escape closes.
commonMistakes: No visible label. Missing keyboard nav. Selected state not communicated.

guidelines: role=checkbox with aria-checked. Visible label via htmlFor. 44x44px target. Space to toggle. aria-checked=mixed for indeterminate.
commonMistakes: Div without role=checkbox. No label. Small touch target.
